title: SubmissionUpdateRequest
description: Validation rules for updating mutable submission fields (F0006-S0003). Status changes use /transitions endpoint; assignment changes use /assignment endpoint.

programId.description: Associated program. Must reference a valid, non-deleted program when provided.

lineOfBusiness.description: LOB classification. Validated against known LOB values when provided.

lobAttributes.description: Dynamic product attributes. Version switches are allowed only for the approved null-LOB triage transition or governed migration paths.

premiumEstimate.description: Estimated premium amount. Must be non-negative when provided.
